---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{r}
library(shiny)
library(Seurat)
library(plotly)
library(MASS)
library(viridis)
library(tibble)
```

```{r}
seu <- readRDS("C:/Users/dan_m/OneDrive - University College London/UCL_Senior_Research_Fellow/Cutaneous lupus public data/GSE186476_RAW/bili_etal_cle_immune_only.rds")
```

```{r}
seu <- AddModuleScore(
  seu,
  features = list(c("FOXP3","IL2RA","CTLA4")),
  name = "TregScore"
)
all_genes <- rownames(GetAssayData(seu, slot = "data"))
```
```{r}
ui <- fluidPage(
  
  titlePanel("scRNA Gating Explorer"),
  
  # Top row: Scatter plot + gene selectors + gating summary
  fluidRow(
    column(width = 6,
           plotlyOutput("scatter"),
           selectInput("gene_x", "Gene X", choices = all_genes, selected = "CD3D"),
           selectInput("gene_y", "Gene Y", choices = all_genes, selected = "CD8A")
    ),
    column(width = 6,
           h4("Gating Summary"),
           verbatimTextOutput("gate_summary")
    )
  ),
  
  # Bottom row: UMAP + histogram
  fluidRow(
    column(width = 6,
           plotlyOutput("umap")
    ),
    column(width = 6,
           h4("Histogram of gated cells"),
           selectInput("hist_gene", "Marker for histogram", choices = all_genes, selected = "CD3D"),
           plotlyOutput("histogram")
    )
  ),
  
  # DE Analysis
  fluidRow(
    column(width = 12,
           h4("Differential Expression: Gated vs Ungated"),
           actionButton("run_dea", "Run DE Analysis"),
           plotlyOutput("volcano_plot"),
           tableOutput("deg_table")
    )
  )
)
```
```{r}
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Store selected cells
  selected_cells <- reactiveVal(character(0))
  
  ###### Scatter plot with gating ######
  output$scatter <- renderPlotly({
    
    req(input$gene_x, input$gene_y)
    
    df <- as.data.frame(GetAssayData(seu, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")[c(input$gene_x, input$gene_y), ])
    df <- as.data.frame(t(df))  # rows = cells
    df$cell <- rownames(df)
    
    # arcsinh + jitter
    df[[input$gene_x]] <- asinh(jitter(df[[input$gene_x]], amount = 0.02))
    df[[input$gene_y]] <- asinh(jitter(df[[input$gene_y]], amount = 0.02))
    
    # 2D density
    dens <- MASS::kde2d(df[[input$gene_x]], df[[input$gene_y]], n = 100)
    ix <- findInterval(df[[input$gene_x]], dens$x)
    iy <- findInterval(df[[input$gene_y]], dens$y)
    df$density <- dens$z[cbind(ix, iy)]
    
    # axis buffer
    x_min <- min(df[[input$gene_x]], na.rm = TRUE)
    x_max <- max(df[[input$gene_x]], na.rm = TRUE)
    y_min <- min(df[[input$gene_y]], na.rm = TRUE)
    y_max <- max(df[[input$gene_y]], na.rm = TRUE)
    x_buffer <- 0.05 * (x_max - x_min)
    y_buffer <- 0.05 * (y_max - y_min)
    
    plot_ly(
      df,
      x = ~get(input$gene_x),
      y = ~get(input$gene_y),
      type = "scattergl",
      mode = "markers",
      key = ~cell,
      source = "scatter",
      color = ~density,
      colors = viridis::viridis(100),
      marker = list(size = 4),
      showlegend = FALSE
    ) %>%
      layout(
        dragmode = "select",
        xaxis = list(title = input$gene_x, range = c(min(0, x_min - x_buffer), x_max + x_buffer)),
        yaxis = list(title = input$gene_y, range = c(min(0, y_min - y_buffer), y_max + y_buffer))
      )
  })
  
  ###### Capture rectangle selection ######
  observeEvent(event_data("plotly_selected", source = "scatter"), {
    s <- event_data("plotly_selected", source = "scatter")
    if (!is.null(s)) {
      selected_cells(s$key)
    } else {
      selected_cells(character(0))
    }
  })
  
  ###### UMAP plot ######
  output$umap <- renderPlotly({
  
  emb <- Embeddings(seu, "umap")[,1:2]
  df_umap <- data.frame(
    UMAP1 = emb[,1],
    UMAP2 = emb[,2],
    cell = rownames(emb)
  )
  
  # Default grey for all cells
  df_umap$selected <- "Other"
  
  # Turn selected cells red only if any cells have been gated
  if(length(selected_cells()) > 0){
    df_umap$selected[df_umap$cell %in% selected_cells()] <- "Selected"
  }
  
  plot_ly(
    df_umap,
    x = ~UMAP1,
    y = ~UMAP2,
    type = "scattergl",
    mode = "markers",
    color = ~selected,
    colors = c("grey", "red"),
    marker = list(size = 4),
    showlegend = TRUE
  ) %>%
    layout(
      xaxis = list(title = "UMAP1", zeroline = FALSE),
      yaxis = list(title = "UMAP2", zeroline = FALSE)
    )
})
  
  ###### Histogram / Density plot ######
  output$histogram <- renderPlotly({
  
  req(input$hist_gene)
  
  df <- FetchData(seu, vars = input$hist_gene, slot = "data")
  df$cell <- rownames(df)
  df$selected <- df$cell %in% selected_cells()
  
  # Split gated / ungated
  gated_vals <- df[[input$hist_gene]][df$selected]
  ungated_vals <- df[[input$hist_gene]][!df$selected]
  
  # Check if we have enough points for density
  safe_density <- function(x) {
    if(length(x) > 1 && !all(is.na(x))) density(x, na.rm = TRUE) else NULL
  }
  
  dens_gated <- safe_density(gated_vals)
  dens_ungated <- safe_density(ungated_vals)
  
  p <- plot_ly()
  
  if(!is.null(dens_ungated)){
    p <- p %>% add_lines(x = dens_ungated$x, y = dens_ungated$y, name = "Ungated", line = list(color="grey"))
  }
  
  if(!is.null(dens_gated)){
    p <- p %>% add_lines(x = dens_gated$x, y = dens_gated$y, name = "Gated", line = list(color="red"))
  }
  
  # Placeholder if no densities
  if(is.null(dens_gated) && is.null(dens_ungated)){
    p <- p %>% add_trace(x = 0, y = 0, type="scatter", mode="markers", marker=list(color="transparent"))
  }
  
  p %>% layout(
    title = paste("Density:", input$hist_gene),
    xaxis = list(title = input$hist_gene),
    yaxis = list(title = "Density")
  )
})
  
  ###### DE Analysis ######
  # Store DEA results and top10 in reactiveValues
rv <- reactiveValues(dea_res = NULL, top10 = NULL)

# Run DEA when button is clicked
observeEvent(input$run_dea, {
  
  gated <- selected_cells()
  
  # Require at least 2 cells to run
  if(length(gated) < 2){
    showNotification("Select at least 2 cells to run DE analysis.", type = "error")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  withProgress(message = "Running DE Analysis...", value = 0, {
    
    incProgress(0.1, detail = "Preparing cell sets")
    Sys.sleep(0.1)
    
    max_cells <- 1000

gated <- intersect(selected_cells(), Cells(seu))
ungated <- setdiff(Cells(seu), selected_cells())

# downsample
if(length(gated) > max_cells) gated <- sample(gated, max_cells)
if(length(ungated) > max_cells) ungated <- sample(ungated, max_cells)
    
    incProgress(0.3, detail = "Running FindMarkers")
    
    dea <- FindMarkers(
      seu,
      ident.1 = gated,
      ident.2 = ungated,
      assay = "RNA",
      slot = "data",
      logfc.threshold = 0
    )
    
    incProgress(0.7, detail = "Processing results")
    
    # Add gene names for plotting and tables
    dea$gene <- rownames(dea)
    
    # Sort by adjusted p-value and get top 10 by logFC
    top10 <- dea %>% dplyr::arrange(p_val_adj) %>% head(10)
    
    # Store in reactiveValues
    rv$dea_res <- dea
    rv$top10 <- top10
    
    incProgress(1, detail = "Done!")
  })
})

# Volcano plot
output$volcano_plot <- renderPlotly({
  req(rv$dea_res)
  dea <- rv$dea_res
  
  plot_ly(
    dea,
    x = ~avg_log2FC,
    y = ~-log10(p_val_adj + 1e-300),  # avoid log(0)
    type = "scatter",
    mode = "markers",
    text = ~gene,
    marker = list(size = 6,
                  color = ifelse(dea$gene %in% rv$top10$gene, "red", "grey")),
    hoverinfo = "text+x+y"
  ) %>%
    layout(
      xaxis = list(title = "Log2 Fold Change"),
      yaxis = list(title = "-log10(Adjusted P-value)")
    )
})

# Table of top 10 DEGs
output$deg_table <- renderTable({
  req(rv$top10)
  rv$top10 %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, avg_log2FC, p_val, p_val_adj)
})
  
}

```
```{r}
shinyApp(ui, server)
```
